title: Provenance is becoming a product requirement, not a research topic
summary: More teams are treating AI authorship metadata as a default part of publishing workflows, especially where trust and auditability matter.

title: Creative pipelines need containers, not just tags
summary: Loose metadata fields cannot preserve linked assets, prompts, and integrity records across handoffs. Packaging is the missing layer.

title: Trust signals have to be readable by both humans and tools
summary: Adoption depends on standard formats that work for creators, viewing applications, archives, and automated validation systems.
